tools.name: get_rca_report
tools.description: Fetches Root Cause Analysis (RCA) data for a specific site or incident from the company's internal API. Use this when you have an incident ID or a site name.

incident_id.description: The unique ID of the incident.

site_name.description: The name of the site (e.g., London, Tokyo).

tools.name: get_pof_report
tools.description: Fetches Point of Failure (POF) diagnostics for a component. Use this to identify why a specific service is failing.

component_id.description: The unique ID of the component failing.
